title: SK Hynix hits $1 trillion valuation as AI boom lifts South Korean chip stocks
summary_full: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.
summary_public: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.
